title: Hegseth Grilled on US-Iran War Costs and Naval Blockade

contents:
## Hegseth Grilled on US-Iran War Costs and Naval Blockade

### Overview
US Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth faced intense congressional questioning over the ongoing war against Iran, including its $25 billion cost and naval blockade.

### Details
Democrats challenged Hegseth and Joint Chiefs Chairman Gen. Dan Caine on the conflict's ballooning expenses, munitions depletion, and a school bombing that killed children. Hegseth defended the operation, noting Iran retains nuclear ambitions and thousands of missiles despite US strikes. The US imposed a naval blockade on Iranian shipping, with three aircraft carriers deployed to the Middle East for the first time in over 20 years.

### Geographic context
Location: Washington, United States.
